member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper
member.summary: Shared helpers for formatter plugins: cycle detection, object cleaning, type checks. All formatters reference this library to reuse common serialization infrastructure.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.DefaultMaxDepth
member.summary: The default maximum depth if not otherwise specified.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.TypeNameKey
member.summary: Internal special key for storing the real .NET type name in a dictionary for XML element naming.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.JsonOptions
member.summary: JSON serializer options (indented, ignoring null).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.ReferenceEqualityComparerInstance
member.summary: Reference equality comparer for cycle detection in object graphs. Uses the built-in on .NET 5+.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.IsPrimitiveOrString(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if the given object is a primitive/string/enum/decimal/datetime, etc.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.IsSerializableType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if a Type can be safely serialized. Returns false for types that cannot be serialized (IntPtr, SafeHandle, Delegate, etc.).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.CleanObjectForJson(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Object})
member.summary: Recursively cleans an object for JSON/YAML serialization. Removes cycles, limits depth, ignores PS* props.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.CleanObjectForXml(System.Object,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Object})
member.summary: Recursively cleans an object for XML serialization with __PSDR_TypeName for element naming.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.InferXmlRootName(System.Object)
member.summary: Infers an intelligent XML root element name based on object type.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterHelper.GetSimpleTypeName(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a simple, clean type name from an object.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterOptions
member.summary: Options passed to formatter Serialize/Deserialize methods. Formatters use only the options relevant to them and ignore the rest.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterOptions.MaxDepth
member.summary: Maximum recursion depth for serialization (default 10).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterOptions.CsvDelimiter
member.summary: CSV column delimiter (default ',').

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterOptions.XmlRootName
member.summary: XML root element name. Null means auto-detect from object type.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterRegistry
member.summary: Default in-memory formatter registry. Thread-safe for concurrent reads after initial registration.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterRegistry.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance shared across the module lifetime.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition
member.summary: Defines a serialization formatter plugin. Each formatter assembly implements this interface to provide serialize/deserialize for a specific format (JSON, XML, CSV, YAML, etc.). Discovered automatically at module load time via assembly scanning.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition.Name
member.summary: Canonical formatter name (e.g., "Json", "Xml", "Csv", "Yml"). Must be unique across all loaded formatters.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition.FileExtensions
member.summary: File extensions this formatter handles, including the leading dot (e.g., ".json", ".yml", ".yaml"). Used for automatic format detection from file names.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition.CanDeserializeContent(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether this formatter can handle the given content string based on heuristics (e.g., starts with '{' for JSON, '<' for XML). Used as fallback when file extension is not available.
member.returns: True if this formatter can likely handle the content.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition.Serialize(System.Object,PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterOptions)
member.summary: Serializes an object to a string in this formatter's format.
member.param: Serialization options (maxDepth, delimiter, root name, etc.).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition.Deserialize(System.String,PSDataRepository.Formatters.FormatterOptions)
member.summary: Deserializes a string back into an object (PSObject, array, scalar, etc.).

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry
member.summary: Registry for formatter plugins. Provides lookup by name and by file extension/content.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.Register(PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterDefinition)
member.summary: Registers a formatter definition.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.GetFormatter(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a formatter by its canonical name (e.g., "Json").

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.GetAll
member.summary: Gets all registered formatters.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.GetFormatterNames
member.summary: Gets all registered formatter names.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.DetectFromFileName(System.String)
member.summary: Detects the appropriate formatter from a file name (extension-based). Returns null if no formatter matches.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.DetectFromContent(System.String)
member.summary: Detects the appropriate formatter from content heuristics. Returns null if no formatter matches.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.DetectFromNameAndContent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detects formatter from file name first, then falls back to content heuristics. Returns null if no formatter matches.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Formatters.IFormatterRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Removes all registered formatters. Used during module reload/testing.
